---
title: "Question One"
author: "Fhatuwani Mokwenda"
format: 
  html: 
    theme: cyborg
---

## Question One

Using a *foreach* loop to repeat 100 times.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(foreach)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
# generating a rn sample from an exp dist. w/ mean = 1
n <- 100

df <- foreach(i = 1: n, .combine = rbind) %dopar% {
  exp_sample <- rexp(n, rate = 1)
  samp_mean <- mean(exp_sample)
  samp_var <- var(exp_sample)
  c(samp_mean, samp_var)

}

as.tibble(df)
 
```
